title: Lava Fishing
description: A minecraft mod which allows you to fish in the lava.
body:
# Introducing

An addon of [Aquaculture 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/aquaculture).

add some content about lava and nether.

also have some food, weapon, etc.

![lavafishing](https://s2.loli.net/2024/06/13/EeKdJR2rcbS6OCG.png)
